Year in Review

What Happened
in 1945?

Major events, music, film, tech & prices from 1945

The World in 1945
🌍EventsGermany surrenders; VE Day celebrated in Europe (May 8) · President Roosevelt dies; Truman becomes president (Apr 12) · US drops atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki (Aug 6, 9) · Japan surrenders; World War II ends (Aug 15) · United Nations Charter signed in San Francisco (Jun 26) · Nuremberg Trials of Nazi war criminals begin (Nov 20)
🎵MusicRum and Coca-Cola – Andrews Sisters
🎬FilmMildred Pierce
💻TechThe first atomic bomb was detonated at Trinity site in New Mexico
🛒PricesBread $0.09 · Gas $0.21/gal · House $4,600

What major events happened in 1945?

1945 was a year of significant world events that shaped history. From political upheavals to cultural milestones, the year left a lasting mark on society. The music charts, cinema screens, and technological landscape of 1945 reflect the era's unique character. Prices for everyday goods like bread, gasoline, and homes give a vivid snapshot of the economic climate of the time.

Why is 1945 historically significant?

Each year carries its own defining moments and cultural touchstones. 1945 contributed unique chapters to the story of the 20th and 21st centuries. Whether you lived through 1945 or are researching it, the events, art, technology, and everyday costs of that year paint a rich picture of life at the time.

Frequently asked questions

What major events happened in 1945?

Major world events of 1945 include: Germany surrenders; VE Day celebrated in Europe (May 8); President Roosevelt dies; Truman becomes president (Apr 12); US drops atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki (Aug 6, 9); Japan surrenders; World War II ends (Aug 15).

What was the #1 song in 1945?

The most iconic song of 1945 was Rum and Coca-Cola – Andrews Sisters.

What was the top film in 1945?

The standout film of 1945 was Mildred Pierce.

What did things cost in 1945?

In 1945, a loaf of bread cost $0.09, gasoline was $0.21/gal, and the average house was $4,600.

What technology milestone happened in 1945?

The first atomic bomb was detonated at Trinity site in New Mexico

Source Wikipedia – 1945
